We further impose motion constraints by supervising temporal and spatial derivatives of the deformation field. Experimentally, our learned dynamics achieves superior accuracy, generalization, and robustness, while learning physically meaningful residual anisotropy. Finally, we validate MoSA in a robot manipulation setting, showing that better real-to-sim dynamics modeling translates into more reliable sim-to-real transfer. Project Page is available at https://mercerai.github.io/MoSA/.

</details>


### [364] [Benchmarking Machine Learning Architectures for Antimicrobial Stewardship in Pediatric ICUs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22611)
*Niklas Raehse,Luregn J. Schlapbach,Daphné Chopard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了表格、序列和图模型在预测PICU抗生素管理干预时机上的表现，发现模型性能主要取决于目标患病率和数据集特征，而非模型复杂度；序列模型可改善精确率-召回率权衡但校准性较差，简单表格模型概率估计更可靠。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PICU中抗菌药物管理至关重要，但诊断不确定性常导致广谱抗生素过度使用，增加耐药性和长期危害。现有机器学习工作主要针对成人人群和静态表格数据，缺乏在儿科重症监护场景下的系统评估。

Method: 基于公开数据集和私有机构队列，定义四个临床代理目标（静脉转口服、降阶梯、停药、短程治疗），在统一评估框架下比较表格、序列和图模型在多个时间分辨率上的表现。

Result: 预测性能主要由目标患病率和数据集特征驱动，而非模型复杂度；序列模型在粗粒度（24小时）分辨率下改善精确率-召回率权衡，但校准性较差；细粒度时序建模增益有限；多任务学习仅带来边际改进。

Conclusion: 强调了目标设计、时间表示和校准在临床机器学习中的重要性，为开发儿科AMS可靠决策支持系统提供了实践指导。

Abstract: Antimicrobial stewardship (AMS) is critical in pediatric intensive care units (PICUs), where diagnostic uncertainty often drives broad-spectrum antibiotic use, increasing antimicrobial resistance and potential long-term harms. Machine learning offers a promising approach for identifying patient-level opportunities for stewardship interventions from electronic health record data, yet prior work has focused largely on adult populations and static tabular representations. We present a systematic benchmarking study of AMS intervention prediction in the PICU across a public dataset and a private institutional cohort. We define four clinically relevant proxy targets for reducing antibiotic exposure: intravenous-to-oral switching, de-escalation, discontinuation, and short-course therapy. Under a unified evaluation framework, we compare tabular, sequence-based, and graph-based temporal models at multiple temporal resolutions. We find that predictive performance is driven primarily by target prevalence and dataset characteristics rather than model complexity. Sequence models improve the precision-recall trade-off over tabular approaches at coarse (24-hour) resolution, while finer temporal modeling provides limited additional benefit. However, these gains come at the cost of poorer calibration, with simpler tabular models yielding more reliable probability estimates. Multi-task learning produces only marginal improvements, suggesting limited shared structure across stewardship targets. Our findings highlight the importance of target design, temporal representation, and calibration in clinical machine learning, and provide practical guidance for developing reliable decision support systems for pediatric AMS.

</details>


### [365] [Evolutionary Multi-Task Optimization for LLM-Guided Program Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22613)
*Halil Alperen Gozeten,Xuechen Zhang,Emrullah Ildiz,Ege Onur Taga,Tara Javidi,Samet Oymak*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出EMO-STA框架，通过两阶段多任务进化优化（先共享进化再任务适应）提升LLM引导的程序搜索效率，在多种任务族中优于单任务进化，并展示了共享进化在低数据场景下缓解过拟合的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM引导的进化搜索方法逐任务独立优化，忽略了相关任务间可复用的共享结构，导致计算效率低下且泛化能力受限。

Method: 提出EMO-STA两阶段框架：第一阶段跨任务族共享进化生成可执行程序档案，第二阶段通过多种适应策略（热启动、最佳平均共享、最佳各任务共享）将共享程序适配到具体目标任务。

Result: 在连续优化、几何构造、建模、算法优化等8个任务族中，EMO-STA在大多数设置下优于同等计算量的单任务进化；STA Best-Local在分布内适应最强，STA Best-Shared在未见任务上展现鲁棒迁移；计算分配实验表明共享与适应预算大致平衡时最优；共享进化在低数据场景（ARC任务、时间序列特征工程）中能缓解过拟合。

Conclusion: 多任务进化优化能有效利用任务间共享结构提升LLM引导的程序发现效率与泛化能力，共享进化本身具有正则化效应，有助于在数据稀缺时发现更鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent LLM-guided evolutionary search methods have shown that iterative program mutation can discover strong algorithms, but they typically optimize each task independently, even when related tasks share reusable structure. We introduce Evolutionary Multi-Task Optimization (EMO) for LLM-guided program discovery, and propose EMO-STA (Shared-Then-Adapt), a two-stage framework that first evolves a shared archive of executable programs across a task family and then adapts selected shared candidates to each target task. Within EMO-STA, we explore multiple adaptation strategies, including warm-starting from the shared archive, adapting the best average shared program, and adapting the shared program that performs best on each target task. Across eight task families spanning continuous optimization, geometric construction, modeling, and algorithmic optimization, EMO-STA improves over matched-compute single-task evolution in most settings, with STA Best-Local providing the strongest in-distribution adaptation and STA Best-Shared yielding robust transfer to unseen tasks. Compute-allocation experiments show that allocating a substantial fraction of the family-level budget to shared evolution is consistently beneficial, with roughly balanced shared and adaptation budgets often being optimal. Beyond compute efficiency, we show that shared evolution can mitigate overfitting in low-evidence settings (e.g. few training data), including ARC tasks and time-series feature engineering, by favoring programs that generalize across all tasks rather than exploiting task-specific brittle artifacts.

</details>


### [366] [A note on convergence of Wasserstein policy optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22622)
*David Šiška,Yufei Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明了在熵正则化马尔可夫决策过程框架下，Wasserstein策略优化（WPO）能够实现线性收敛到全局最优解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管WPO在连续动作空间强化学习中取得了经验上的成功，但其在连续状态和动作空间下的理论收敛性质尚未被充分建立。

Method: 利用平均场分析的最新进展，借助对数索博列夫不等式（log-Sobolev inequalities）来论证梯度流的收敛性；假设梯度流方程存在足够正则的解，证明沿流的单调能量耗散，并建立局部对数索博列夫不等式。

Result: 证明了在熵正则化MDP框架下，WPO的价值函数线性收敛到全局最优解。

Conclusion: WPO在连续状态-动作空间环境中具有理论上的线性收敛保证。

Abstract: Wasserstein Policy Optimization (WPO) is a recently proposed reinforcement learning algorithm that leverages Wasserstein gradient flows to optimize stochastic policies in continuous action spaces. Despite its empirical success, the theoretical convergence properties of WPO in environments with continuous state and action spaces have yet to be fully established. In this note, we argue that WPO within the framework of entropy-regularised Markov Decision Processes converges linearly. This is done by leveraging recent advances in mean-field analysis for convergence of gradient flows using log-Sobole inequalities. Assuming existence of sufficiently regular solution to the gradient flow equation we demonstrate monotonic energy dissipation along the flow and establish a local log-Sobolev inequality. Ultimately, these properties allow us to argue that the value function should converge linearly to the global optimum.

</details>


### [367] [Why SGD is not Brownian Motion: A New Perspective on Stochastic Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22644)
*Igor Ignashin,Anna Radovskaya,Andrew Semenov,Egor Lopatin,Stanislav Potapov,Aleksandr Kovalenko,Andrey Veprikov,Aleksandr Shestakov,Andrey Leonidov,Aleksandr Beznosikov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的SGD建模框架，将其视为波动损失景观中的确定性动力学，推导出不同于标准Langevin形式的离散Fokker-Planck方程，并发现近平坦方向上的方差随时间增长（有效扩散），在CV和NLP模型上得到了实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的将SGD建模为Langevin过程的方法依赖于连续时间极限和sqrt(eta)噪声缩放，这与有限学习率下的离散SGD更新不匹配。作者希望提出一个更准确的离散框架来描述SGD的真实动力学行为。

Method: 从离散SGD更新出发，推导参数分布的主方程和离散Fokker-Planck方程（包含eta^2阶项）；沿均值Hessian的特征基分解动力学行为，分析临界点附近的定性不同 regime（受限vs扩散模式）。

Result: 近平坦方向不存在稳态分布，方差随时间增长，有效扩散系数与学习率成正比；在CV和NLP神经网络模型上观察到受限模式与扩散模式的清晰定性分离。

Conclusion: 传统的Langevin近似在有限学习率下不准确，新框架更能捕捉SGD的真实动力学，特别是沿平坦谷底的扩散行为，为理解SGD的隐式正则化提供了新视角。

Abstract: Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) is commonly modeled as a Langevin process, assuming that minibatch noise acts as Brownian motion. However, this approximation relies on a continuous-time limit and a sqrt(eta) noise scaling that does not match the discrete SGD update at finite learning rate. In this work, we propose an alternative formulation of SGD as deterministic dynamics in a fluctuating loss landscape induced by minibatch sampling. Starting directly from the discrete update, we derive a master equation for the parameter distribution and obtain a discrete Fokker--Planck equation that differs from the standard Langevin form at order eta^2. Using this framework, we analyze SGD dynamics near critical points of the loss. We show that the behavior decomposes along the eigenbasis of the mean Hessian into qualitatively distinct regimes. In particular, nearly-flat directions do not admit a stationary distribution: the variance grows over time, corresponding to effective diffusion along valleys with a coefficient proportional to the learning rate. We provide empirical evidence supporting these predictions on neural network models in computer vision and natural language processing, observing a clear qualitative separation between confined and diffusive modes.

</details>


### [368] [ChronoVAE-HOPE: Beyond Attention -- A Next-Generation VAE Foundation Model for Specialized Time Series Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22684)
*José Alberto Rodríguez,Luis Balderas,Miguel Lastra,Antonio Arauzo-Azofra,José M. Benítez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ChronoVAE-HOPE 是一种新一代时间序列基础模型，通过引入基于 HOPE Block 的 VAE 框架（包含 Titans 短期记忆和 CMS 长期记忆模块）替代标准注意力机制，并利用解耦潜空间分离趋势与季节成分，在 UCR 分类基准上取得了优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 TSFM 在适应时间序列分类任务时面临两个关键挑战：标准注意力机制的二次复杂度问题，以及无法解耦时间序列中不同结构成分（如趋势和季节成分）的能力不足。

Method: 提出 ChronoVAE-HOPE 框架：1) 核心为 HOPE Block，用 Titans 动态短期记忆模块 + CMS 连续记忆系统替代二次注意力；2) 构建解耦潜空间，通过独立编码器头和解码器路径将表示分解为趋势和季节成分；3) 在 Monash 数据集上进行自监督预训练，结合 MTSM 辅助目标和 VAE 重构损失；4) 冻结预训练编码器，为下游 UCR 分类任务生成固定长度嵌入。

Result: 在多种时间域上表现强劲，特别是在具有严格因果结构的场景中展现出卓越性能，验证了结构化生成表示在时间序列分类中的有效性。

Conclusion: ChronoVAE-HOPE 为将基础模型适应时间序列分类任务提供了一个鲁棒且可解释的框架，通过结构化生成式表示实现了大规模泛化与可解释性的统一。

Abstract: Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) have become a new component of the state-of-the-art in general time series forecasting. However, adapting them to specialized classification tasks remains constrained by two interconnected challenges: the quadratic cost of standard attention mechanisms and the inability to disentangle the structural components underlying time series variability. This technical report introduces ChronoVAE-HOPE, a next-generation TSFM that reconciles massive generalization with structured latent representation for time series classification. The core of the proposal is a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) framework built upon the HOPE Block, which replaces quadratic attention with a dual-memory system: Titans modules for dynamic short-term retention and a Continuum Memory System (CMS) for the abstraction of long-term historical context. A key architectural novelty is the disentangled latent space, which factorizes representations into independent trend and seasonal components via dedicated encoder heads and separate decoder pathways. ChronoVAE-HOPE undergoes self-supervised pre-training on the Monash archive, combining a Masked Time Series Modeling (MTSM) auxiliary objective with a disentangled VAE reconstruction loss. The pre-trained encoder is subsequently frozen and used to generate fixed-length embeddings for downstream classification on the UCR benchmark datasets. Empirical results demonstrate strong performance across diverse temporal domains, particularly in settings characterized by strict causal structure. ChronoVAE-HOPE establishes a robust and interpretable framework for the adaptation of foundation models to time series classification through structured generative representations.

</details>


### [369] [Posterior Collapse as Automatic Spectral Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22691)
*Johannes Hirn*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明β-VAE中的后验坍缩实现了自动谱剪枝，揭示了潜在模式按贡献度依次坍缩的级联机制，并通过Landau稳定性分析和序参量定义了坍缩阈值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解β-VAE中后验坍缩的内在机制，将其与谱剪枝联系起来，并建立可预测坍缩行为的理论框架。

Method: 通过Landau稳定性分析从损失函数推导坍缩行为；定义对潜在重缩放不变的序参量来排序活跃潜在模式；在线性高斯情况下验证坍缩谱、效用谱与归一化PCA谱的一致性。

Result: 后验坍缩按β设定的阈值自动剪枝低贡献潜在模式；坍缩呈级联特性（从最不有用到最有用的模式依次坍缩）；线性高斯情况下坍缩遵循平均场定律；在WorldClim数据集上验证了预测。

Conclusion: β-VAE的后验坍缩并非缺陷，而是一种自动化的谱剪枝机制，可用于识别哪些有效变量值得优先检查。

Abstract: We show that posterior collapse in $β$-VAEs implements automatic spectral pruning. A latent mode collapses if its contribution to reconstruction is below the cutoff set by $β$. Equilibrium solutions with different $β$ thus reveal a cascade of collapses as latent modes decouple from least to most useful.
  We derive this as a consequence of the loss via a Landau stability analysis. We define a latent-rescaling-invariant order parameter that ranks active latent modes and whose collapse thresholds identify which effective variables to inspect first.
  In the linear Gaussian case, the collapse spectrum, utility spectrum, and normalized PCA spectrum coincide, and each collapse follows a mean-field law. We test these predictions on the WorldClim dataset.

</details>


### [370] [Clipping Bottleneck: Stabilizing RLVR via Stochastic Recovery of Near-Boundary Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22703)
*Shuo Yang,Jinda Lu,Chiyu Ma,Kexin Huang,Haoming Meng,Qihui Zhang,Yuyang Liu,Bolin Ding,Guoyin Wang,Li Yuan,Jingren Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现RLVR训练中硬裁剪策略会丢弃裁剪边界附近的有用信号，提出一种名为NSR的随机性边界救援方法，可简单插拔地恢复被丢弃的信号，显著提升训练稳定性和收敛效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对RLVR训练中GRPO式目标存在的训练不稳定和次优收敛问题，识别出硬裁剪决策是核心瓶颈，因其在裁剪边界外丢弃了可能包含有用信息的信号。

Method: 提出Near-boundary Stochastic Rescue (NSR)，一种轻量级的即插即用修改方案，通过随机性保留略微超出裁剪边界的token来恢复丢失的信号。该方法可被解释为在期望上引入隐式梯度衰减，但其随机性边界局部救援机制比确定性梯度衰减更有效。

Result: 在7B到30B不同规模的模型（包括稠密和MoE架构）上进行了大量实验，NSR作为即插即用方案显著提升了训练稳定性，并在DAPO和GSPO等强基线上取得了一致性提升。

Conclusion: 识别出硬裁剪是RLVR训练的关键瓶颈后，简单的边界随机扰动就能恢复性能；NSR作为一种极简的随机性边界救援方法，有效解决了该问题，展示了边界信号的重要性。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a central paradigm for scaling LLM reasoning, yet its optimization often suffers from training instability and suboptimal convergence. Through a systematic dissection of clipping-based GRPO-style objectives, we identify the rigid clipping decision induced by hard clipping as a key practical bottleneck in the studied RLVR setups. Specifically, our analysis suggests that informative signals can lie in the near-boundary region just beyond the clipping threshold, and are therefore discarded by the standard hard-clipping rule. Notably, once this bottleneck is precisely identified, even simple stochastic perturbations at the boundary can recover meaningful performance gains. Building on this finding, we propose Near-boundary Stochastic Rescue (NSR), a minimal, plug-and-play modification that stochastically retains these slightly out-of-bound tokens to recover lost signals. While NSR, via stochastic sampling, can be interpreted as inducing an implicit gradient decay in expectation, our ablations reveal that its stochastic, boundary-local rescue mechanism is consistently more effective than deterministic gradient decay. Validated by extensive experiments across model sizes from 7B to 30B and both dense and MoE architectures, as a plug-and-play solution, NSR substantially improves training stability and delivers consistent gains over strong baselines such as DAPO and GSPO.

</details>


### [371] [Abstraction for Offline Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22711)
*Clarisse Wibault,Alexander Goldie,Antonio Villares,Maike Osborne,Jakob Foerster*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于相对化选项（relativised options）的层次化方法，通过绝对抽象（absolute abstraction）提升离线目标条件强化学习（GCRL）中的样本效率与性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MDP在目标条件强化学习中常因对称性和跨状态-目标对的共享结构存在大量冗余。虽然层次化策略已被用于时间抽象以缩减地平线，但本文希望探索层次结构是否还能带来绝对抽象（absolute abstraction）的优势。

Method: 引入相对化选项（relativised options）与不同层次的不同表征，使智能体能在状态空间中相似上下文间复用经验；基于此框架提出两种简单算法，分别学习相对化选项和从绝对参考系中抽象。

Result: 实验表明，所提出的归纳偏置（inductive biases）显著提升了离线GCRL的性能。

Conclusion: 层次策略不仅带来时间抽象，还能实现绝对抽象，通过相对化选项和分层表征能有效提升离线GCRL的学习效果。

Abstract: Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) often exhibit significant redundancy due to symmetries and shared structure across state-goal pairs in real-world Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning (GCRL). While hierarchical policies have been motivated for horizon reduction via temporal abstraction in offline GCRL, we demonstrate that hierarchy also enables absolute abstraction. By introducing relativised options as well as distinct representations for different levels of the hierarchy, we demonstrate how an agent can reuse experience across similar contexts of the state-space. Based on this framework, we introduce two simple algorithms for learning relativised options and abstracting from the absolute frame of reference. Our experiments show that such inductive biases significantly improve performance in offline GCRL.

</details>


### [372] [Reading Task Failure Off the Activations: A Sparse-Feature Audit of GPT-2 Small on Indirect Object Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22719)
*Mahdi Nasermoghadasi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对GPT-2 small在间接宾语识别（IOI）任务上的稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征进行了审计，发现特征17,491（"加密密钥"）与任务失败高度相关（d=+2.93），但因果消融实验表明它并非充分原因；最终贡献是一个廉价、模型无关的审计流程而非单个特征发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在通过系统审计找出与模型任务失败相关SAE特征，并验证这些特征是真正的因果机制还是仅相关关系，为可解释性研究提供更严谨的方法论。

Method: 使用300个IOI提示词，比较GPT-2 small在成功与失败 trial 中层8残差流SAE特征的激活差异；通过Holm校正显著性检验和Cohen's d效应量筛选特征，并进行了三项控制实验：因果消融、表征基线对比、种子鲁棒性检查。

Result: 24,576个特征中有146个通过显著性阈值，105个达到大效应量（|d|>0.8）；最强相关特征17,491（d=+2.93）对"the keys"高度敏感；因果消融未能恢复准确率（6.7%→4.4%）；Logistic回归在原始残差流上AUC=0.929，匹配SAE特征的0.927；种子鲁棒性检查中特征17,491仅在1/5次运行中为top特征。

Conclusion: 该方法论贡献在于提供了一个廉价、模型无关、可复现的审计流程，而非某个具体的特征发现；强调了可解释性研究中需要进行因果验证等控制实验，避免将相关性误认为因果机制。

Abstract: We report a small, reproducible audit of which sparse-autoencoder (SAE) features of GPT-2 small fire differently on failed versus successful trials of the Indirect Object Identification (IOI) task. On 300 prompts, GPT-2 small reaches 79.7% accuracy; 146 of the 24,576 features in the layer-8 residual-stream SAE release of Bloom (2024) clear a Holm-corrected significance threshold and 105 reach a large effect size (|Cohen's d| > 0.8). The strongest single correlate of failure -- feature 17,491, d=+2.93, Neuronpedia label 'cryptographic keys' -- is essentially silent except when the prompt's transferred object is 'the keys,' on which GPT-2 small fails 93.3% of the time vs. 7.5% on the other seven objects (Fisher exact p = 8.79 x 10^-33). We put this correlate through three controls that a mechanistic claim should pass. (i) A causal ablation: zeroing feature 17,491 in the residual stream across all token positions of the 45 keys prompts does not restore accuracy (6.7% -> 4.4%); the feature is a correlate, not a sufficient cause at this layer. (ii) A representation baseline: a logistic regression on the raw 768-dimensional residual stream reaches 5-fold ROC AUC = 0.929, matching the top-100 SAE features (0.927); the SAE basis adds interpretability, not predictive power. (iii) A seed-robustness check: across five random seeds the keys-subset failure rate stays in 75.0--93.3% (the behavioural effect is real), but feature 17,491 is the top-|d| feature in only 1 of 5 runs. The methodological contribution is therefore the audit pipeline (cheap, model-agnostic, surfaces named correlates) rather than any single feature found through it. We release the code, the 300-prompt corpus, the 300x24,576 activation matrix, the ablation and baseline scripts, and the figures. The full pipeline runs on a laptop (Apple M3 Max, no discrete GPU).

</details>


### [373] [The Value of Covariance Matching in Gaussian DDPMs and the Lanczos Sampler](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22723)
*Md Sahil Akhtar,Aymane El Gadarri,Vivek F. Farias,Adam D. Jozefiak*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明高斯DDPM中匹配完整后验协方差可将路径KL散度从Ω(1/T)降至O(1/T²)，并提出无需训练的Lanczos高斯采样器(LGS)，仅需3次雅可比-向量乘积即可逼近最优逆协方差，在图像基准上超越强对角协方差基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高斯DDPM使用各向同性逆协方差会导致路径KL散度存在Ω(1/T)的不可避免误差，需要探索如何突破这一理论瓶颈。

Method: 1) 理论证明匹配完整后验协方差可将路径KL降至O(1/T²)；2) 提出LGS算法，利用Lanczos迭代通过协方差-向量乘积（来自后验均值的雅可比-向量乘积）采样最优逆协方差，无需存储或额外模型。

Result: LGS近似误差随Lanczos步数指数衰减；仅需3步Lanczos迭代即可在标准图像基准上超越OCM-DDPM等强对角协方差基线。

Conclusion: 完整协方差匹配在理论和实践上都具有价值，使得快速DDPM采样变得可行。

Abstract: A central error measure in Gaussian DDPMs is the path-space KL divergence between the exact reverse chain and the learned Gaussian reverse process. This quantity is especially relevant for procedures such as classifier guidance, which perturb the entire reverse trajectory rather than only the terminal sample. Prior analyses show that standard isotropic reverse covariances suffer an unavoidable $Ω(1/T)$ path-KL error as the number of denoising steps $T$ grows. We show that matching the full posterior covariance breaks this barrier, yielding an order-wise improvement that reduces the path KL to $O(1/T^2)$. To make full covariance matching practical, we introduce the Lanczos Gaussian sampler (LGS), a training-free, matrix-free method for sampling from the optimal reverse covariance using only covariance-vector products, which are available through Jacobian-vector products of the posterior mean. LGS avoids dense covariance storage and auxiliary covariance models. We prove that LGS approximation error decays exponentially in the number of Lanczos steps, where each Lanczos step requires a single Jacobian-vector product. Empirically, using only just three such steps improves sample quality over strong diagonal-covariance baselines, including OCM-DDPM, across standard image benchmarks. This identifies full covariance matching as both theoretically valuable and practically accessible for fast DDPM sampling.

</details>


### [374] [Multiple Neural Operators Achieve Near-Optimal Rates for Multi-Task Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22724)
*Adrien Weihs,Hayden Schaeffer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了多任务操作符学习（Multiple Neural Operators, MNO）的近似与统计复杂度，证明共享表示不会增加整体学习成本，多任务与单任务操作符学习遵循相同的标度律，且MNO与多任务DeepONet在渐近近似率上等价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索多任务场景下操作符学习的理论极限，尤其是共享表示是否能降低学习复杂度。

Method: 推导了Lipschitz多操作符映射的近最优上界，同时建立了参数复杂度的诅咒并证明了极小极大速率，并与多任务DeepONet进行了渐近比较。

Result: 多任务操作符学习与单任务遵循相同的标度律；MNO与多任务DeepONet在最坏情况近似复杂度下渐近等价。

Conclusion: 共享表示不增加多任务操作符学习的整体成本，架构间差异在渐近意义上不显著。

Abstract: We study the approximation and statistical complexity of learning collections of operators in a shared multi-task setting, with a focus on the Multiple Neural Operators (MNO) architecture. For broad classes of Lipschitz multiple operator maps, we derive near-optimal upper bounds for approximation and statistical generalization. On the lower-bound side, we establish a curse of parametric complexity and prove corresponding minimax rates. Together, these results show that shared representations across tasks do not increase the overall cost: multi-task operator learning follows the same scaling laws as single operator learning. We also compare MNO with a multi-task extension of DeepONet based on concatenated task inputs and show that, from a worst-case approximation-complexity perspective, both architectures satisfy essentially the same asymptotic rates.

</details>


### [375] [Post-Training is About States, Not Tokens: A State Distribution View of SFT, RL, and On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22731)
*Dong Nie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出后训练的状态分布视角，通过小规模实验证明训练状态的来源（固定数据集 vs 当前模型生成）与监督信号形式同样重要，并展示了不同后训练方法（SFT、RL、OPD）在状态分布上的差异对性能的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分析多聚焦损失函数（最大似然、策略梯度、KL散度等），忽视了监督所施加的状态分布这一互补因素。作者希望从"状态分布塑造"的角度形式化理解后训练。

Method: 形式化定义后训练为状态分布塑造；在Qwen3-0.6B-Base上进行受控小规模实验，使用GSM8K作为目标任务，TruthfulQA和MMLU作为保留能力评估；对比SFT（固定数据集状态）、RL（当前策略诱导状态）和OPD（当前策略诱导状态）的效果。

Result: 1) 轻度SFT提升GSM8K且遗忘少，而高强度SFT导致严重遗忘；2) 从退化的SFT教师进行OPD，在GSM8K、TruthfulQA和MMLU上均超越教师；3) 轻量on-policy RL提升GSM8K并保持保留能力。

Conclusion: 后训练中状态分布与监督信号同等重要，采用on-policy状态（当前模型生成前缀）有助于在提升目标任务能力的同时保持原有能力。

Abstract: Large language model post-training methods such as supervised fine-tuning (SFT), reinforcement learning (RL), and distillation are often analyzed through their loss functions: maximum likelihood, policy gradients, forward KL, reverse KL, or related objective-level variants. We study a complementary factor: the state distribution on which supervision is applied. For an autoregressive policy, a state is a prompt plus generated prefix. SFT trains on fixed dataset states, while RL and on-policy distillation (OPD) train on states induced by the current learner. We formalize post-training as state-distribution shaping and run a controlled smallscale study using Qwen3-0.6B-Base on GSM8K, with TruthfulQA and MMLU as retention evaluations. Our results show three phenomena. First, a mild SFT run improves GSM8K with little forgetting, while a stress SFT run causes substantial retention loss. Second, OPD from a degraded SFT teacher surpasses that teacher on GSM8K, TruthfulQA, and MMLU, despite using the teacher as its only supervision source. Third, a lightweight on-policy RL run improves GSM8K while preserving retention. These results support a state-centric view of post-training: the source and locality of training states can be as important as the form of the supervision signal.

</details>


### [376] [The Distillation Game: Adaptive Attacks & Efficient Defenses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22737)
*Youssef Allouah,Mahdi Haghifam,Sanmi Koyejo,Reza Shokri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过最小最大博弈框架研究蒸馏攻击中的部署权衡，提出了一种自适应的评估方法和教师端防御策略PoE（Product-of-Experts）。实验表明，自适应学生相比被动评估能恢复更多能力，PoE在成本更低的情况下与其他昂贵防御的鲁棒性差距显著缩小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 蒸馏攻击为模型提供商带来了部署权衡：模型输出的有用性与可模仿性之间存在矛盾。现有防御评估多采用被动学生，未能反映真实威胁。

Method: 构建最小最大博弈框架（效用约束教师 vs 自适应学生）；提出自适应评估规则（学生对高价值样本重加权）；提出教师端防御PoE（将教师与代理学生进行乘积组合，仅需前向传播）。

Result: 自适应评估揭示了大的被动-自适应差距：在SOTA防御上，自适应学生恢复能力远超被动评估；PoE与昂贵防御的鲁棒性差距在此评估下显著缩小，且PoE成本更低、推理痕迹质量更高。

Conclusion: 强蒸馏攻击难以有效阻止；抗蒸馏研究应使用自适应学生而非被动学生进行评估。

Abstract: Distillation attacks create a deployment trade-off for model providers: the same outputs that make a model more useful can also make it easier to imitate. We study this trade-off through a minimax game between a utility-constrained teacher and an adaptive student. Our framework yields tractable one-sided response rules: an adaptive evaluation rule in which the student reweights high-value examples, and a teacher-side defense template that suppresses outputs most useful for distillation. From a cheap proxy for example value, we derive Product-of-Experts (PoE), a simple forward-pass-only defense that combines the teacher with a proxy student during generation. Empirically, adaptive evaluation reveals a large passive--adaptive gap: on state-of-the-art defenses, adaptive students recover substantially more capability than passive evaluation suggests on GSM8K and MATH. Under this stronger evaluation, the apparent robustness gap between expensive defenses and PoE narrows considerably, while PoE remains substantially cheaper and preserves higher-quality reasoning traces. Overall, our results suggest that strong distillation remains difficult to stop, and that progress on antidistillation should be judged against adaptive students rather than passive ones. Our code is available at: https://github.com/ysfalh/distillation-game.

</details>


### [377] [Proxy-Based Approximation of Shapley and Banzhaf Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22738)
*Santo M. A. R. Thies,Hubert Baniecki,R. Teal Witter,Eyke Hüllermeier,Maximilian Muschalik,Fabian Fumagalli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ProxySHAP提出了一种结合树模型代理与残差校正的高效Shapley/Banzhaf交互指数估计方法，在理论上推导了多项式时间算法和最大样本重用的偏差校正条件，实验上在精度和速度上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高阶交互指数估计方法在速度与精度之间存在权衡，缺乏同时兼顾效率与一致性的解决方案。

Method: 1) 利用树模型代理实现高样本效率；2) 提出多项式时间算法推广TreeSHAP，避免指数级复杂度；3) 引入最大样本重用（MSR）残差校正策略，在理论上刻画其偏差校正条件与方差特性。

Result: ProxySHAP在精度上达到新SOTA，在小预算和大预算场景下均取得最低误差，显著优于ProxySPEX和KernelSHAP-IQ，并在下游可解释任务上表现更佳。

Conclusion: ProxySHAP有效兼顾了效率与一致性，为大规模特征空间下的交互指数估计提供了实用且理论上可保证的解决方案。

Abstract: Shapley and Banzhaf interactions capture the complex dynamics inherent in modern machine learning applications. However, current estimators for these higher-order interactions trade off between speed and accuracy. To overcome this limitation, we introduce ProxySHAP. ProxySHAP reconciles the high sample efficiency of tree-based proxy models with a principled path to consistency via residual correction. On a theoretical level, we derive a polynomial-time generalization of interventional TreeSHAP to compute exact interaction indices for tree ensembles, successfully bypassing exponential tree-depth dependencies in prior methods. Furthermore, we formally analyze the residual adjustment strategy, characterizing the specific conditions under which Maximum Sample Reuse (MSR) corrects proxy bias without its variance scaling exponentially with interaction size. Extensive benchmarking demonstrates that ProxySHAP sets a new state-of-the-art standard for approximation quality, including in large-scale applications with thousands of features. By achieving the lowest error in both small- and large-budget regimes, ProxySHAP significantly outperforms the prior best estimators ProxySPEX and KernelSHAP-IQ, while also delivering superior performance on downstream explainability tasks.

</details>


### [378] [Ternary Decision Trees with Locally-Adaptive Uncertainty Zones](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22740)
*William Smits*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出三元决策树，在分裂节点中引入不确定区域（半宽delta），对落入该区域的实例进行加权混合预测并标记为边界不确定。五种delta估计方法中，margin方法在72个数据集上表现最优，无需额外超参数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统决策树使用硬性二元阈值划分特征空间，导致远离决策边界和恰在边界上的实例被赋予相同的置信度，无法区分边界附近的不确定样本。

Method: 提出三元决策树，在每个分裂节点增加一个以最优阈值为中心、半宽为delta的不确定区域。落入该区域的实例通过加权混合两个子树的预测结果进行推断。提出五种delta估计方法：quality-plateau、class-overlap、gain-ratio、node-bootstrap和margin，其中delta完全基于CART分裂过程中已有统计信息计算。

Result: 在72个OpenML-CC18数据集上，五种方法的概率路由均显著优于标准CART（p<0.001）。margin方法效率最高（每单位边界不确定标记率获得0.104准确率增益），在42/72数据集上胜出。在Breiman合成基准上，margin在干净数据上自校准，node-bootstrap和quality-plateau最佳追踪理论不可约误差。

Conclusion: 三元决策树通过局部自适应地标记边界不确定实例，在不需额外超参数的前提下提升了决策树的预测性能与可解释性，在医疗和金融等高风险应用场景具有实用价值。

Abstract: Decision trees partition the feature space using hard binary thresholds, assigning identical confidence to instances far from a decision boundary and to those directly on it. We introduce ternary decision trees, which augment each split node with an uncertainty zone of half-width delta centered on the optimal threshold. Instances in this zone receive predictions formed by weighted blending of both child subtrees and are flagged as boundary-uncertain, signaling that downstream applications may treat these predictions differently. Crucially, delta is computed locally at each node from statistics already available during standard CART split finding, requiring no external noise specification. We propose and evaluate five delta-estimation methods: quality-plateau (plateau width of the split criterion curve), class-overlap (empirical class-distribution overlap), gain-ratio (split quality relative to split entropy), node-bootstrap (threshold variance under node-level resampling), and margin (SVM-inspired distance to the nearest cross-class training example). Evaluated across 72 OpenML-CC18 datasets with 5-fold cross-validation, all five methods with probabilistic routing significantly outperform standard CART on decided accuracy (Wilcoxon signed-rank, p < 0.001). The margin method achieves the best efficiency (0.104 accuracy gain per unit of boundary-uncertain flagging rate), wins on 42 of 72 datasets, and requires zero additional hyperparameters. Analysis on three Breiman synthetic benchmarks reveals that margin is self-calibrating on clean data while node-bootstrap and quality-plateau best track theoretical irreducible error. Experiments on four medical and financial datasets demonstrate practical value: on mammography, node-bootstrap achieves +0.71% decided accuracy by flagging 10.8% of screening cases as boundary-uncertain.

</details>


### [379] [SeqLoRA: Bilevel Orthogonal Adaptation for Continual Multi-Concept Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22743)
*Javad Parsa,Enis Simsar,Amir Joudaki,Thomas Hofmann,André M. H. Teixeira*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SeqLoRA，一种基于约束持续学习框架的参数高效微调方法，通过双层优化联合优化LoRA因子，实现多概念图像生成中的身份保持与可扩展性，理论证明了收敛性和遗忘界限，实验在最多101个概念上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法在组合多个自定义概念时存在表征干扰问题，模块化方法要么依赖昂贵的后验融合，要么冻结适应子空间，限制了表达能力和概念保真度。本文旨在解决表达性与概念保真度之间的权衡。

Method: 提出SeqLoRA框架：采用约束持续学习范式，通过双层优化（bilevel optimization）联合优化LoRA的两个因子矩阵；将残差层激活建模为矩阵亚高斯过程，推导灾难性遗忘的高概率界；证明从数据中学习LoRA基比固定基方法更有效地最小化残差干扰能量。

Result: 在最多101个概念的多概念图像生成任务上，SeqLoRA在身份保持和可扩展性方面优于现有方法，避免了昂贵的融合操作，减少了生成图像中的属性干扰。

Conclusion: SeqLoRA通过持续学习框架和理论保障，有效解决了多概念组合中的表征干扰问题，在保持概念保真度的同时实现了良好的可扩展性，为参数高效的多概念微调提供了新范式。

Abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning enables fast personalization of text-to-image diffusion models, but composing multiple custom concepts remains challenging due to representation interference. Existing modular methods either rely on expensive post-hoc fusion or freeze adaptation subspaces, which limit expressiveness and concept fidelity. To address this trade-off, we propose Sequential regularized LoRA (SeqLoRA), a constrained continual learning framework that jointly optimizes both LoRA factors via bilevel optimization. Theoretically, we establish strong convergence guarantees for our algorithm and model the residual layer activations as a matrix sub-Gaussian process to derive high-probability bounds on catastrophic forgetting. We further prove that learning the LoRA basis from data minimizes residual interference energy more effectively than frozen-basis methods. Experiments on multi-concept image generation demonstrate that SeqLoRA improves identity preservation and scalability across up to 101 concepts, while avoiding costly fusion and reducing attribute interference in composed generations.

</details>


### [380] [Plug-in Losses for Evidential Deep Learning: A Simplified Framework for Uncertainty Estimation that Includes the Softmax Classifier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22746)
*Berk Hayta,Hannah Laus,Simon Mittermaier,Felix Krahmer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对证据深度学习（EDL）中Dirichlet期望目标函数计算复杂的问题，提出用Dirichlet均值的plug-in损失近似替代，证明近似误差随证据量增长而衰减，并在语音命令数据集上验证了该方法在保持性能的同时简化了实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EDL通过Dirichlet分布提供单次不确定性估计，但其期望目标函数比标准监督损失更复杂，导致分析和实现困难。作者希望简化EDL的损失函数，使其更易于使用标准深度学习训练流程。

Method: 将EDL的一阶经验风险最小化目标用Dirichlet均值处的plug-in损失近似，证明在温和假设下近似误差随证据量增长而衰减（适用于MSE和交叉熵等损失函数）。该框架在特定证据到Dirichlet映射下包含标准softmax分类器。

Result: 在Google Speech Commands数据集上，简化目标在预测精度和选择性预测性能上与经典EDL相当，且首次在语音识别任务中通过EDL获得了覆盖度-精度权衡曲线。

Conclusion: 所提出的简化损失函数可以替代复杂的EDL目标，在保持不确定性估计能力的同时简化实现，并为softmax在不确定性估计中的使用提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Real-world sensor-based learning systems require uncertainty estimation that is both reliable and computationally efficient. Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) provides single-pass uncertainty estimation by modeling the class probabilities via Dirichlet distributions, where the Dirichlet parameters are predicted by a learned neural network mapping. However, this approach can lead to computational challenges, as Dirichlet expected objectives are more complex than standard supervised learning losses, complicating their analysis and implementation. We address this issue by approximating the objective of the first-order empirical risk minimization problem induced by EDL with a plug-in loss evaluated at the Dirichlet mean and show that, under mild assumptions, the approximation error decays with growing evidence for a broad class of loss functions, including mean-squared error and cross-entropy loss. As a special case, our analysis provides justification for the use of softmax in the context of uncertainty estimation, since under a particular evidence-to-Dirichlet mapping, our framework includes the standard softmax classifier. We validate the proposed simplified objectives on the Google Speech Commands dataset and show that they achieve predictive accuracy and selective prediction performance comparable to classical EDL, while being simpler to implement using standard deep learning losses and training pipelines. To the best of our knowledge, this empirical analysis is the first to obtain coverage-accuracy trade-offs for speech recognition tasks through EDL.

</details>


### [381] [Cyber-Physical Anomaly Detection in IoT-Enabled Smart Grids Using Machine Learning and Metaheuristic Feature Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22749)
*Adis Alihodžić,Eva Tuba,Milan Tuba*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出结合遗传算法特征选择与机器学习的混合方法，从112个PMU测量属性中精选约27个关键特征，在智能电网攻击检测中将宏F1提升至0.9212、ROC-AUC提升至0.9837，证明多数同步电气测量存在冗余，紧凑特征子集即可实现准确可解释的异常检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代智能电网依赖密集的测量与通信基础设施，虽提升了监控能力，但也增加了网络-物理攻击的脆弱性。需要区分物理故障与恶意攻击，且希望降低数据维度以提高检测效率与可解释性。

Method: 使用MSU/ORNL电网攻击数据集，结合遗传算法（GA）进行特征选择，采用多种机器学习基线模型（逻辑回归、RBF-SVM、XGBoost、随机森林、Extra Trees）进行对比，最终使用GA+Extra Trees模型在压缩特征空间下进行分类。

Result: Extra Trees在全部112个特征上表现最佳；GA+Extra Trees将特征压缩至平均27.4个，宏F1从0.9118提升至0.9212，ROC-AUC从0.9791提升至0.9837。

Conclusion: 大量同步电气测量存在冗余，通过遗传算法筛选出的紧凑特征子集不仅能保持甚至提升检测性能，还能提高模型的可解释性，可用于智能电网中高效可靠的攻击检测。

Abstract: Modern smart grids rely on dense measurement infrastructures, communication links, and intelligent field devices. Although this improves supervision and control, it also increases vulnerability to cyber-physical disruptions. Operators must distinguish physical incidents, such as faults or line disturbances, from malicious actions, such as false data injection or unauthorized command execution. This chapter investigates this problem using the well-known MSU/ORNL Power System Attack Dataset. The proposed method combines machine learning with genetic-algorithm-based feature selection. The objective is twofold: to classify attack and natural events accurately, and to determine whether a reduced set of physically informative PMU/IED measurements can support reliable detection. Several baseline models are evaluated, including logistic regression, RBF-SVM, XGBoost, Random Forest, and Extra Trees. The results show that tree-based ensemble models are the most effective for the considered dataset, with Extra Trees providing the strongest full-feature baseline. After feature selection, the GA + Extra Trees model reduces the clean PMU feature space from 112 attributes to an average of 27.4 attributes over five runs, while increasing macro-F1 from 0.9118 to 0.9212 and ROC-AUC from 0.9791 to 0.9837. These results indicate that many synchronized electrical measurements are redundant. A compact subset of phasor-based features can still provide accurate and interpretable anomaly detection in smart grids.

</details>


### [382] [Lumberjack: Better Differentially Private Random Forests through Heavy Hitter Detection in Trees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22756)
*Christian Janos Lebeda,David Erb,Tudor Cebere,Aurélien Bellet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Lumberjack 提出了一种差分隐私随机森林算法，通过构建大型随机决策树并应用激进的隐私保护剪枝，结合新颖的层次数据重尾检测算法，在保持隐私性的同时显著提升了模型效用，达到了新的最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的差分隐私随机森林方法在保护隐私时通常严重牺牲模型性能，导致实用性不足。作者希望设计一种能缩小隐私-效用差距的实用方法。

Method: 1) 构建大型随机决策树；2) 采用激进的隐私保护剪枝策略，仅保留节点样本充足的部分；3) 提出一种针对层次数据的新颖 (ε,δ)-DP 重尾检测算法，其误差为 O(√log h)，支持使用更深的树。

Result: 在基准数据集上，Lumberjack 持续优于现有的差分隐私随机森林方法，建立了新的最优性能，在实用隐私预算下显著改善了隐私-效用权衡。

Conclusion: 精心设计的差分隐私随机森林可以大幅缩小隐私-效用差距，这是未来值得探索的、有前景的研究方向。

Abstract: Random forests are widely used in fields involving sensitive tabular data, but existing approaches to enforcing differential privacy (DP) typically degrade performance to the point of impracticality. In this paper, we introduce Lumberjack, a differentially private random forest algorithm that achieves substantially higher utility by constructing large random decision trees and then applying aggressive, privacy-preserving pruning to retain only sufficiently populated nodes. A key component of our approach is a novel $(\varepsilon,δ)$-DP heavy hitter detection algorithm for hierarchical data, whose error is $O_{\varepsilon,δ}(\sqrt{\log h})$ for trees of height $h$ and may be of independent interest. This favorable scaling enables the use of significantly deeper trees than in prior work, leading to improved expressiveness under privacy constraints. Our empirical evaluation on benchmark datasets shows that Lumberjack consistently outperforms prior DP random forest methods, establishing a new state of the art. In particular, our approach yields substantial improvements in the privacy-utility trade-off for practical privacy budgets. Our findings suggest that carefully designed DP random forests can close much of the utility gap, highlighting a promising and underexplored direction for future research.

</details>


### [383] [Uniform Diffusion Models Revisited: Leave-One-Out Denoiser and Absorbing State Reformulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22765)
*Samson Gourevitch,Yazid Janati,Dario Shariatian,Umut Simsekli,Eric Moulines,Eric P. Xing,Alain Durmus*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了均匀扩散模型（UDM）中标准插值桥参数化与去噪目标之间的不匹配问题，提出了留一法后验参数化方法来改进生成效果，并引入了一种吸收态重构方法，使UDM能够像掩码扩散模型一样高效采样。实验表明，参数化和采样设计比边际分布本身更能解释掩码扩散与均匀扩散之间的性能差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散扩散模型中，掩码扩散模型（MDM）和均匀扩散模型（UDM）虽都用清洁数据预测来训练，但反向动态的定义方式不同。标准UDM的插件式桥参数化未能被去噪后验优化，存在参数化与训练目标之间的不匹配问题，影响生成质量。作者希望厘清这种不匹配，并找到更好的参数化与采样策略。

Method: 1) 理论分析：证明UDM的插件桥参数化实际优化的是留一法后验（leave-one-out posterior），而非标准去噪后验，推导了去噪器、留一法后验和得分之间的精确转换公式。2) 提出基于留一法预测的知情预测器-校正器采样器和改进的温度采样策略，无需额外训练。3) 提出吸收态重构（absorbing-state reformulation）方法，在保持UDM联合分布的前提下，将其拆解为类似掩码扩散的采样操作，具备更简单的去噪后验、延续式去掩码和自然重掩码机制。

Result: 在语言建模任务上，留一法参数化一致地提升了UDM的生成质量；吸收态重构后的UDM能够达到甚至超越掩码扩散模型的性能。这表明掩码扩散与均匀扩散之间的经验差距主要由参数化和采样设计驱动，而非边际分布本身的选择。

Conclusion: 离散扩散模型中的参数化选择和采样设计比边际分布类型对生成性能影响更大。留一法后验和吸收态重构为改进UDM提供了有效方案，缩小了其与MDM的差距，为后续离散扩散模型的设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: Discrete diffusion models are often trained through clean-data prediction, but the prediction can be used in different ways to define the reverse dynamics. In Masked Diffusion Models (MDM) these choices largely coincide, whereas in Uniform Diffusion Models (UDM) they do not. We show that the standard plug-in bridge parameterization for UDM is not optimized by the denoising posterior, but by a leave-one-out posterior that predicts each clean token without using its own noisy observation. This identifies a mismatch between the plug-in ELBO and the usual cross-entropy denoising objective. We characterize the leave-one-out target and derive exact conversions between the denoiser, the leave-one-out posterior, and the score. These conversions allow us to disentangle parameterization and training objective. Our results also lead to inference improvements without any additional training through an informed predictor-corrector sampler and improved temperature sampling based on the leave-one-out predictor.
  We further introduce an absorbing-state reformulation of uniform diffusion that preserves the UDM joint law while decomposing it into masked-diffusion-like sampling operations, with simpler denoising posteriors, carry-over unmasking, and a natural remasking mechanism. On language modeling, leave-one-out parameterizations consistently improve UDM generation, while the absorbing construction matches or surpasses masked diffusion. These results suggest that the empirical gap between masked and uniform diffusion is driven less by the choice of marginals themselves than by parameterization and sampling design. The code and models can be found at https://github.com/samsongourevitch/rev_udm.

</details>


### [384] [CogAdapt: Transferring Clinical ECG Foundation Models to Wearable Cognitive Load Assessment via Lead Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22774)
*Amir Mousavi,Mohammad Sadegh Sirjani,Erfan Nourbakhsh,Mimi Xie,Rocky Slavin,Leslie Neely,John Davis,John Quarles*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CogAdapt框架，通过LeadBridge适配器和ProFine渐进微调策略，将临床ECG基础模型适配到可穿戴设备的认知负荷评估任务，在两个数据集上显著优于从头训练的基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实时的认知负荷评估对于自适应人机交互至关重要，但面临标注数据有限和跨主体泛化能力差的挑战。现有ECG基础模型虽预训练于大量临床数据，但因传感器配置不匹配和任务差异，无法直接用于可穿戴设备。

Method: 提出CogAdapt框架，包含两个核心组件：1) LeadBridge——一个可学习的适配器，将3导联可穿戴信号转换为解剖学一致的12导联表示；2) ProFine——渐进微调策略，逐步解冻编码器层并防止灾难性遗忘。

Result: 在两个公开数据集（CLARE和CL-Drive）上采用留一法交叉验证，CogAdapt的macro-F1分数分别达到0.626和0.768，显著优于从头训练的基线模型。

Conclusion: 研究表明，通过基础模型适配的方法，能够实现可穿戴传感器上跨主体的认知负荷评估，具有很好的应用前景。

Abstract: Real-time cognitive load assessment is essential for adaptive human-computer interaction but remains challenging due to limited labeled data and poor cross-subject generalization. Recent ECG foundation models pre-trained on millions of clinical recordings offer rich representations, but cannot be directly applied to wearable devices due to sensor configuration mismatch and task differences. In this paper, we propose CogAdapt, a framework that adapts clinical ECG foundation models to wearable cognitive load assessment. CogAdapt introduces LeadBridge, a learnable adapter that transforms 3-lead wearable signals into anatomically consistent 12-lead representations, and ProFine, a progressive fine-tuning strategy that gradually unfreezes encoder layers while preventing catastrophic forgetting. Evaluations on two public datasets (CLARE and CL-Drive) under leave-one-subject-out cross-validation show that CogAdapt substantially outperforms baselines trained from scratch, achieving macro-F1 scores of 0.626 and 0.768. These results demonstrate the promise of foundation model adaptation for subject-independent cognitive load assessment from wearable sensors.

</details>


### [385] [MambaGaze: Bidirectional Mamba with Explicit Missing Data Modeling for Cognitive Load Assessment from Eye-Gaze Tracking Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22775)
*Amir Mousavi,Mohammad Sadegh Sirjani,Erfan Nourbakhsh,Mimi Xie,Rocky Slavin,Leslie Neely,John Davis,John Quarles*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MambaGaze提出了一种基于眼动追踪的实时认知负荷评估框架，通过XMD编码处理数据缺失问题，并利用双向Mamba-2模型以线性复杂度捕捉长时程时间依赖，在CLARE和CL-Drive数据集上分别达到76.8%和73.1%的准确率，并在NVIDIA Jetson平台上实现了43-68 FPS的实时推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 眼动信号中的频繁数据缺失（如眨眼、跟踪失败）以及长时程时间依赖的高效建模是实时认知负荷评估的两大挑战，现有方法难以同时解决这些问题。

Method: 1) XMD编码：通过观测掩码和时间增量增强原始特征，显式建模数据不确定性；2) 双向Mamba-2：以线性计算复杂度捕捉时间依赖关系。

Result: 在CLARE和CL-Drive数据集上，留一被试交叉验证下分别达到76.8%和73.1%的准确率，领先CNN、Transformer、ResNet、VGG基线4-12个百分点；在NVIDIA Jetson上实现43-68 FPS实时推理，功耗低于7.5W。

Conclusion: MambaGaze在准确性和实时性上均优于现有方法，具备在可穿戴设备上部署的可行性，为安全关键应用中的自适应人机交互提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Real-time cognitive load assessment from eye-tracking signals could potentially enable adaptive human-centered-AI such as safety-critical applications such as driver vigilance monitoring or automated flight deck assistance, yet two challenges persist: handling frequent data missingness from blinks and tracking failures, and efficiently modeling long-range temporal dependencies. We propose MambaGaze, a framework that addresses these challenges through 1) XMD encoding, which augments raw features with observation masks and time-deltas to explicitly model data uncertainty, and 2) bidirectional Mamba-2, which captures temporal dependencies with linear computational complexity. Experiments on CLARE and CL-Drive datasets under leave-one-subject-out evaluation show that MambaGaze achieves 76.8% and 73.1% accuracy, respectively, outperforming CNN, Transformer, ResNet, and VGG baselines by 4-12 percentage points. Edge deployment benchmarks on NVIDIA Jetson platforms demonstrate real-time inference at 43-68 FPS with power consumption below 7.5W, confirming feasibility for wearable cognitive load monitoring.

</details>


### [386] [SDPM: Survival Diffusion Probabilistic Model for Continuous-Time Survival Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22776)
*Stanislav R. Kirpichenko,Andrei V. Konstantinov,Lev V. Utkin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出生存扩散概率模型(SDPM)，一种基于去噪扩散模型的连续时间生存分析方法，无需参数化假设或时间离散化，在十项真实数据集上展现出竞争性的预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生存分析方法要么对风险函数施加结构假设，要么离散化时间轴，限制了灵活性并引入近似误差。本文旨在提出一种无需参数假设和时间离散化的连续时间生存分析方法。

Method: SDPM使用去噪扩散模型对生存结果的条件分布 P(T,δ|x) 进行建模。在条件独立删失假设下，利用条件生成样本通过Kaplan-Meier估计器转换为生存函数估计。模型采用标准化对数时间变换和删失指示器的连续高斯混合表示来操作变换后的目标空间。

Result: 在十个真实生存数据集上，SDPM在C-index、时变AUC和Brier评分上均达到竞争性表现。合成Cox-Weibull数据实验表明，当生成足够多样本时，SDPM能比强非参数基线更准确地恢复连续生存分布形状。消融研究验证了目标空间变换的重要性。

Conclusion: SDPM作为一种生成式连续时间生存分析方法，无需参数假设和时间离散化，在多个真实数据集上表现出色，能更准确地恢复底层连续生存分布，且目标空间变换对模型性能至关重要。

Abstract: Survival analysis aims to estimate a time-to-event distribution from data with censored observations. Many existing methods either impose structural assumptions on the hazard function or discretize the time axis, which may limit flexibility and introduce approximation errors. We propose the Survival Diffusion Probabilistic Model (SDPM), a generative approach to continuous-time survival analysis. SDPM models the conditional distribution of the survival outcome, represented by the pair of observed time and censoring indicator, $\mathbb{P}(T,δ\mid \mathbf{x})$, using a denoising diffusion model. Under the assumption of conditionally independent censoring, conditional samples generated by the model can be transformed into survival function estimates using the Kaplan-Meier estimator. This formulation avoids parametric assumptions on the event-time distribution and does not require a discretization of the output time space. The model operates in a transformed target space, using standardized log-times and a continuous Gaussian-mixture representation of the censoring indicator. We evaluate SDPM on ten real survival datasets and compare it with five strong baselines, including tree-based, boosting-based, and neural survival models. Results show that SDPM achieves competitive predictive performance across C-index, integrated time-dependent AUC, and integrated Brier score. A study on synthetic Cox-Weibull data demonstrates that SDPM can recover the shape of an underlying continuous survival distribution more accurately than a strong nonparametric baseline when sufficiently many samples are generated. An ablation study confirms the importance of the proposed target-space transformations, which improve event-rate calibration, reduce invalid generated times, and provide consistent gains in predictive discrimination. Codes implementing the proposed model are publicly available.

</details>


### [387] [The Matching Principle: A Geometric Theory of Loss Functions for Nuisance-Robust Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22800)
*Vishal Rajput*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出部署干扰协方差（deployment nuisance covariance）是连接鲁棒性、域适应、对抗训练、IRM、度量学习等多种方法的统一统计问题，并提出了匹配原则（matching principle）：正则化器的范围应覆盖标签保持的部署干扰协方差。在理论、实验和大规模模型上验证了该框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究将鲁棒性、域适应、不变性、正则化等方法视为独立问题，各自有独立的方法族。本文认为它们共享同一统计结构：估计标签保持的部署干扰协方差，然后沿该协方差的范围正则化编码器Jacobian。

Method: 1) 在线性高斯模型下推导闭式最优解（定理A），包括立方根水填充；2) 证明Jacobian惩罚的二次形式需范围覆盖（定理G）；3) 提出轨迹偏离指数（TDI）作为无标签的嵌入敏感性探测指标；4) 在13个预注册实验（含Qwen2.5-7B）上验证匹配→各向同性→错误W的排序。

Result: 13个预注册实验中12个通过，唯一例外（Office-31）是预注册前就已指出的特征间隙失败。在7B规模上，匹配风格PMH改善了选择性诚实性，并保持了Style TDI，而标准DPO使其退化。

Conclusion: 贡献在于命名了部署干扰协方差，阐明了正则化器必须做什么，并提供了一套闭式可证伪理论，而非在每个榜单上追求通用性。

Abstract: Robustness, domain adaptation, photometric and occlusion invariance, compositional generalisation, temporal robustness, alignment safety, and classical anisotropic regularisation are usually treated as separate problems with separate method families. This paper argues that much of their shared structure is one statistical problem: estimate the covariance of label-preserving deployment nuisance, then regularise the encoder Jacobian along a matrix whose range covers that covariance (the matching principle). CORAL, adversarial training, IRM, augmentation, metric learning, Jacobian penalties, and alignment-style constraints are different estimators of that object, not independent robustness tricks.
  In the linear-Gaussian model we prove closed-form optimality (Theorem A), including cube-root water-filling within the matched range; necessity of range coverage for quadratic Jacobian penalties (Theorem G); the same range dichotomy at deep global minima; and two falsification controls (Lemma C; Corollaries E), with seven conditional consistency lemmas (D1-D7) for estimation under standard identifiability assumptions.
  We introduce the Trajectory Deviation Index (TDI), a label-free probe of embedding sensitivity when task accuracy or Jacobian Frobenius norm is insufficient.
  Thirteen pre-registered blocks from classical ML through Qwen2.5-7B test the predicted matched, then isotropic, then wrong-W ordering on geometry and deployment drift; twelve pass, and the sole exception (Office-31) is an eigengap failure named before the run. At 7B scale, matched style-PMH improves selective honesty and preserves Style TDI where standard DPO degrades it.
  The contribution is naming the deployment nuisance covariance, stating what the regulariser must do, and supplying a closed-form falsifiable theory once that object is identified, not universality on every leaderboard.

</details>


### [388] [Remember to be Curious: Episodic Context and Persistent Worlds for 3D Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22814)
*Lily Goli,Justin Kerr,Daniele Reda,Alec Jacobson,Andrea Tagliasacchi,Angjoo Kanazawa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合持久化3D重建模型与序列策略的 curiosity-driven RL 方法，解决了复杂3D环境中智能体因缺乏空间持久性和情景上下文而陷入局部循环的问题，在 HM3D 上训练后零样本泛化到 Gibson 和 AI 生成环境，并在下游任务中取得优异表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 curiosity-driven RL 在复杂逼真的3D环境中容易失败，原因是智能体缺乏空间持久性（对世界的记忆不持续）和情景上下文（无法记住探索轨迹），导致陷入局部循环并反复获得虚假的"新奇"奖励。

Method: 1) 使用在线3D重建作为**持久化世界模型**，持续更新并存储空间信息；2) 将策略参数化为**序列模型**（基于RGB观测），维护情景轨迹历史以导航到新奇区域；3) 训练时仅依赖好奇心驱动，部署时仅需RGB图像。

Result: 在 HM3D 上纯好奇心训练，性能超越基于RL的主动建图基线；零样本泛化到 Gibson 和 AI 生成世界；在下游任务（摘苹果、图像目标导航）中微调后优于从头训练的基线。

Conclusion: 持久化空间模型+情景上下文是解决复杂3D环境中好奇心驱动探索失败的关键，该方法具备强泛化能力和下游任务适应性。

Abstract: Exploration is a prerequisite for learning useful behaviors in sparse-reward, long-horizon tasks, particularly within 3D environments. Curiosity-driven reinforcement learning addresses this via intrinsic rewards derived from the mismatch between the agent's predictive model of the world and reality. However, translating this intrinsic motivation to complex, photorealistic environments remains difficult, as agents can become trapped in local loops and receive fresh rewards for revisiting forgotten states. In this work, we demonstrate that this failure stems from a lack of spatial persistence and episodic context. We show that effective curiosity requires a model of the world that is persistent and continuously updated, paired with an agent that maintains an episodic trajectory history to navigate toward novel regions. We achieve this using an online 3D reconstruction as a persistent model of the world, while the agent policy is parameterized as a sequence model over RGB observations to maintain episodic context. This design enables effective exploration during training while allowing the agent to navigate using solely RGB frames at deployment. Trained purely via curiosity on HM3D, our agent outperforms RL-based active mapping baselines and generalizes zero-shot to Gibson and AI-generated worlds. Our end-to-end policy enables efficient adaptation to downstream tasks, such as apple picking and image-goal navigation, outperforming from-scratch baselines. Please see video results at https://recuriosity.github.io/.

</details>


### [389] [Integrable Elasticity via Neural Demand Potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22820)
*Carlos Heredia,Daniel Roncel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出ICDN模型，一种需求优先的神经网络模型，用于多产品零售需求预测。该模型将对数需求作为对数价格的平滑、上下文条件函数学习，从而能够从学习到的需求表面精确推导弹性。在Dominick's啤酒数据集上，ICDN相比有向对数-对数基准模型提高了样本外泛化能力，并产生了更稳定、经济上合理的弹性估计，特别是对于弱识别的交叉价格效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零售需求模型在捕捉多产品间复杂价格关系方面存在局限，尤其是对弱识别的交叉价格效应估计不稳定且经济上不合理。需要一种能够精确推导弹性且泛化能力更强的需求建模方法。

Method: 提出Integrable Context-Dependent Demand Network (ICDN)，一种需求优先的神经网络模型。将log-demand建模为log-prices的平滑、上下文条件函数，从而能够从学习到的需求表面精确推导弹性。

Result: 在Dominick's啤酒数据集上，ICDN相比有向对数-对数基准模型提升了样本外泛化性能，并产生了更稳定、经济上合理的弹性估计，尤其改进了弱识别的交叉价格效应。

Conclusion: ICDN作为一种需求优先的神经网络模型，能够有效提升多产品零售需求预测的泛化能力和弹性估计的稳定性与经济合理性，为处理复杂的跨产品价格效应提供了新的有效方案。

Abstract: We propose the Integrable Context-Dependent Demand Network (ICDN), a demand-first neural model for multiproduct retail demand. The model learns log-demand as a smooth, context-conditioned function of log-prices, allowing elasticities to be derived exactly from the learned demand surface. On the Dominick's beer dataset, ICDN improves out-of-sample generalization over a directed log-log benchmark and yields more stable, economically plausible elasticity estimates, especially for weakly identified cross-price effects.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [390] [Benchmarking and Improving Monitors for Out-Of-Distribution Alignment Failure in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21602)
*Dylan Feng,Pragya Srivastava,Cassidy Laidlaw*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了MOOD基准，用于评估大语言模型监控管道在分布外（OOD）场景下检测对齐失败的能力，发现结合防护模型（安全分类器）与OOD检测器（如马氏距离和困惑度检测器）可显著提升召回率，且OOD检测带来的增益甚至超过将防护模型参数扩大20倍的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型的安全与对齐失败常发生在分布外（OOD）场景中，现有监控管道缺乏对此类失败的系统性评估，因此需要构建专门的基准来研究这一问题。

Method: 构建MOOD基准，包含受限训练集和七个分布外测试集。训练防护模型（安全分类器），并测试四种OOD检测器（马氏距离、困惑度等），最终将防护模型与OOD检测器组合使用。

Result: 防护模型在OOD场景下泛化能力差；结合马氏距离和困惑度OOD检测器后，召回率从39%提升至45%；OOD检测带来的召回率增益超过将防护模型参数扩大20倍的效果。

Conclusion: OOD检测应成为LLM监控的关键组成部分，为后续研究提供了基础。

Abstract: Many safety and alignment failures of large language models (LLMs) occur due to out-of-distribution (OOD) situations: unusual prompt or response patterns that are unforeseen by model developers. We systematically study whether LLM monitoring pipelines can detect these OOD alignment failures by introducing a benchmark called Misalignment Out Of Distribution (MOOD). It is difficult to find failures that are truly OOD for off-the-shelf models trained on vast safety datasets. We sidestep this by including a restricted training set in MOOD that we use to train our own monitors, as well as seven test sets with diverse alignment failures that are outside the training distribution. Using MOOD, we find that guard models (safety classifiers) often fail to generalize OOD. To fix this, we propose combining guard models with OOD detectors. We test four types of OOD detectors and find that a combination of a guard model with Mahalanobis distance and perplexity-based OOD detectors can improve recall from 39% to 45%. We also establish positive scaling trends across model scales for monitors that combine a guard model and OOD detector; we find that incorporating OOD detection into monitoring achieves a higher recall gain than using a guard model with 20 times more parameters. Our work suggests that OOD detection should be a crucial component of LLM monitoring and provides a foundation for further work on this important problem.

</details>


### [391] [TO-Agents: A Multi-Agent AI Pipeline for Preference-Guided Topology Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21622)
*Isabella A. Stewart,Hongrui Chen,Faez Ahmed*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: TO-Agents是一个多智能体AI框架，能将自然语言设计意图转化为拓扑优化参数，通过迭代优化生成符合偏好的3D结构，并在实验中（悬臂梁和手机支架任务）比基线方法多出6倍的成功率，实现从意图到原型的端到端设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 设计师常需手动将美学、产品体验等定性意图转化为与这些偏好无直接关联的求解器参数，缺乏直观的桥梁。TO-Agents旨在用AI代理连接自然语言设计意图与迭代拓扑优化，让设计师从低层级参数调优转向高层级的形式与功能描述。

Method: 构建多智能体框架：将人类自然语言描述转化为验证后的求解器输入 → 运行拓扑优化求解器 → 渲染3D拓扑 → 利用多视图视觉-语言推理配合独立评判代理评审结果并修订参数。包含四个修订周期、十次独立重复实验，以及用于增材制造的后续处理代理。

Result: 在悬臂梁和手机支架两项任务中，TO-Agents在60%的试验中至少产生一个符合偏好（树状分支结构）的设计，成功率是移除视觉或历史反馈的消融管线的6倍。评判分数和人工评估表明该框架能识别有效参数杠杆、从不良修订中恢复，并扩展设计探索空间。

Conclusion: 代理式拓扑优化有望将设计师从低层参数调优解放到高层形式与功能规范，同时指出了过调、选择性记忆、工具误用和参数推理错误等失败模式，强调了可靠自主工程设计所需的安全保障。

Abstract: Topology optimization can generate efficient structures, but designers often must manually translate qualitative intent, such as desired visual style, product experience, or manufacturability into solver settings that are not directly tied to those preferences. We present TO-Agents, a multi-agent AI framework that connects natural-language design intent with iterative topology optimization. The framework converts a human-provided problem description into validated solver inputs, runs a topology optimization solver, renders the resulting 3D topology, and uses multi-view vision-language reasoning with an independent judge agent to critique each result and revise solver parameters. We evaluate the framework on two long-horizon design tasks: a cantilever beam benchmark and a phone-stand product design. In both tasks, the designer specifies an aesthetic preference for hierarchically branched structures inspired by natural tree morphologies, and the system performs four revision cycles across ten independent replicates. TO-Agents produces at least one preference-aligned design in 60% of trials for each case study, corresponding to up to 6x more successful trials than an ablated pipeline without visual or historical feedback. Judge scores and human evaluations show that the pipeline can identify effective parameter levers, recover from poor revisions, and expand design exploration. A manufacturing agent further post-processes top-ranked designs for additive manufacturing, enabling end-to-end intent-to-prototype design. We also identify failure modes, including overshooting, selective memory, misplaced tools, and incorrect parameter reasoning. These results suggest that agentic topology optimization can shift designers from low-level parameter tuning toward higher-level specification of form and function, while highlighting safeguards needed for reliable autonomous engineering design.

</details>


### [392] [The Shape of Testimony: A Scalable Framework for Oral History Archive Comparison](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21623)
*Itamar Trainin,Renana Keydar,Amit Pinchevski*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过大规模计算分析（1600+证词），验证了USC和Yale两种大屠杀口述史档案的结构差异，同时发现二者存在显著重叠，挑战了简单的"结构化vs自由形式"二分法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大屠杀研究领域长期认为USC证词偏结构化、Yale证词偏自由开放式，这一区分影响了学术研究和档案建设，但缺乏大规模量化验证。

Method: 对超过1600份证词进行话语分割、主题建模和基于大语言模型的分析，从主题连贯性、采访者-幸存者互动动态和问题类型分布三个维度量化"结构化程度"。

Result: 总体上证实了两种档案的结构差异，但同时发现两者在个体访谈内部和常见叙事模式上存在显著重叠，复杂化了简单的二分法。

Conclusion: 挑战了大屠杀研究中"结构化vs自由形式"的简单二分法，提供了一个可扩展、可复现的比较语料库分析框架，对数字口述史、叙事分析和公民科学注释平台设计具有推广价值。

Abstract: Researchers in Holocaust studies have often distinguished between two styles of oral survivor testimony: the USC Shoah Foundation's interviews tend to follow a structured, interviewer-guided format, whereas the Yale Fortunoff Video Archive generally favors a more free-form, open-ended style. This distinction has influenced both scholarly research and the development of later archives. In this study, we critically examine that claim by conducting a large-scale computational analysis of more than 1,600 testimonies from both collections. Leveraging discourse segmentation, topic modeling, and large language model (LLM) based analysis, we quantify the "structuredness" level of testimonies through topic coherence, interviewer-survivor dynamics, and the distribution of question types. Our results generally corroborate the structural differences identified in earlier research, while also revealing significant overlaps between the collections, both within individual interviews and across common narrative patterns. This complicates the simple "structured vs. free-form" dichotomy often applied to these oral histories. Beyond revisiting a foundational claim in Holocaust studies, our work provides a scalable, replicable framework for comparative corpus analysis. As a proof of concept, it suggests broader applications for digital oral history, narrative analysis, and the design of citizen-science annotation platforms.

</details>


### [393] [MindLoom: Composing Thought Modes for Frontier-Level Reasoning Data Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21630)
*Haiyang Shen,Taian Guo,Xuanzhong Chen,Mugeng Liu,Weichen Bi,Wenchun Jing,Sixiong Xie,Zhuofan Shi,Yudong Han,Chongyang Pan,Siqi Zhong,Jinsheng Huang,Ming Zhang,Yun Ma*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MindLoom是一个通过组合式思维模式工程来合成前沿推理数据的框架。它将推理问题的难度视为原子知识-推理转换（思维模式）的累积，通过分解难题、训练检索模型、迭代组合新问题以及难度标注等步骤，生成高质量推理数据用于模型微调。在多个基准测试上，微调后的模型表现优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM推理数据合成方法对问题难度的结构因素洞察有限，导致数据多样性不足且难度控制不稳定，难以系统性地生成前沿水平的推理数据。

Method: MindLoom包含四个阶段：1) 将难题解决方案分解为思维模式链；2) 训练检索模型将问题状态与兼容的思维模式匹配；3) 迭代应用检索到的思维模式组合新问题，并通过分布对齐采样保证多样性；4) 基于rollout的评判阶段标注难度并提供评判正确的响应用于监督微调。

Result: 在覆盖5个STEM学科和4个数学推理任务的9个基准上，MindLoom微调后的模型在多个模型家族和规模上均优于基础模型、蒸馏和外部数据基线。消融实验验证了各组件的贡献，且分析表明MindLoom覆盖了广泛的推理模式并保持有效的难度控制。

Conclusion: MindLoom通过组合式思维模式工程有效解决了推理数据合成中多样性和难度控制的问题，生成了高质量的前沿推理数据，并开源了实现代码。

Abstract: Although LLMs have made substantial progress in reasoning, systematically producing frontier-level reasoning data remains difficult. Existing synthesis methods often have limited visibility into the structural factors that govern problem difficulty, which can result in narrow diversity and unstable difficulty control. In this work, we view the difficulty of a reasoning problem as arising from the accumulation of atomic knowledge-reasoning transformations, which we term thought modes. Building on this perspective, we propose MindLoom, a framework for synthesizing frontier-level reasoning data through compositional thought mode engineering. Given a collection of hard problems with verified solutions, MindLoom first decomposes those solutions into thought mode chains that reveal each problem's construction logic. It then trains a retrieval model that matches problem states to compatible thought modes, providing guidance on which reasoning challenges to introduce during synthesis. New problems are composed by iteratively applying retrieved thought modes to seed questions, with distribution-aligned sampling to encourage diverse reasoning coverage. Finally, a rollout-based judging stage labels generated questions by difficulty and supplies judged-correct responses for supervised fine-tuning. We evaluate MindLoom on nine benchmarks covering five STEM disciplines and four mathematical reasoning tasks across multiple model families and sizes. Models fine-tuned on MindLoom-generated data achieves favorable performances over base models, distillation, and external-data baselines across the reported benchmarks. Ablation studies indicate the contribution of each component, and further analysis suggests that MindLoom covers a broad range of reasoning patterns while maintaining useful difficulty control. We have open-sourced our implementation at https://github.com/EachSheep/MindLoom.

</details>


### [394] [AOP-Wiki EMOD 3.0: Data Model Expansions and Content Evaluation Framework for Using Agentic AI to Improve Integration between AOPs and New Approach Methodologies (NAMs)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21645)
*Virginia K. Hench,J. Harry Caufield,Sierra A. T. Moxon,Jason M. O'Brien,Stephen W. Edwards*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AOP-Wiki EMOD 3.0，一个旨在扩展AOP-Wiki数据模型的原型，以支持计算生成的AOP、定量AOP（qAOP），并提升AOP框架与新方法学（NAMs）的整合，从而服务下一代风险评估和生物医学应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AOP-Wiki作为全球AOP知识库，现有数据模型和基础设施已难以支撑AOP的持续增长与演进；同时，生成式AI的兴起为AOP数据现代化提供了新机遇，亟需对AOP-Wiki进行转型。

Method: 提出AOP-Wiki EMOD 3.0证据模型原型，重点改进内部数据质量、证据结构化以增强FAIR原则和AI就绪性，并改善AOP框架与NAMs之间的整合。

Result: EMOD 3.0具体展示了数据模型扩展的可行性，为支持计算生成AOP和定量AOP（qAOP）奠定基础，同时为AOP在监管科学和"同一健康"背景下的应用提供支撑。

Conclusion: AOP-Wiki EMOD 3.0是AOP知识库现代化转型的重要一步，将推动AOP更有效地服务于下一代风险评估、生物医学及"同一健康"领域。

Abstract: Adverse Outcome Pathways (AOP) are logic models that causally link biological mechanisms that can be measured in a lab to adverse outcomes, relevant to chemical regulatory endpoints. AOPs contextualize new approach methodologies (NAMs), in vitro and in silico methods used as alternatives to animal testing and the sequential events in an AOP serve as multi-scale models spanning biological scales. The AOP-Wiki serves as the global repository for AOPs. While the AOP-Wiki has played a central role in AOP expansion over the past decade, constraints within the current data model and application infrastructure limit the AOP-Wiki from supporting continued AOP growth and evolution. Yet, the transformative power of agentic AI has re-invigorated AOP-Wiki data modernization efforts at a time when core AOP principles can be harnessed to inform use of AI for aggregating and structuring AOP-relevant information. Seizing upon this momentum, we present AOP-Wiki EMOD 3.0, the third in a series of evidence model prototypes, which concretely demonstrates data model expansions and our vision for how the AOP-Wiki might be transformed to better serve regulatory science and emergent use of AOPs in biomedical and One Health contexts. We aim to lay a foundation to support computationally-generated AOPs and quantitative AOPs (qAOPs) by focussing on solutions for AOP-Wiki internal quality improvement, evidence structuring to enhance AOP FAIRness and AI-readiness, and improved integration between the AOP framework and NAMs to better serve next generation risk assessment.

</details>


### [395] [Trace2Skill: Verifier-Guided Skill Evolution for Long-Context EDA Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21810)
*Zijian Du,Nathaniel Pinckney*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Trace2Skill 是一个测试时扩展框架，通过将智能体的自然语言技能视为可进化的策略，利用重复运行的轨迹挖掘成功/失败模式，结合 oracle、mutator 和 selector 循环生成任务特定技能，在无需微调 RTL 模型的情况下大幅提升硬件 LLM 在复杂 Verilog 设计问题上的通过率，甚至攻克此前未解决的任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂 Verilog 设计问题（CVDP）中，硬件 LLM 智能体面临在大型仓库快照中定位验证器相关的 RTL、测试台、包含路径和构建依赖、进行精确编辑以及从稀疏隐藏验证器失败中恢复等挑战，现有方法（训练新模型或仅采样更多候选解）效果有限。

Method: 将智能体的自然语言技能视为可进化策略，通过挖掘重复 rollout 轨迹中的成功/失败模式，将其转化为密集诊断与 oracle 经验；利用 oracle、mutator 和 selector 循环生成任务特定技能，指导后续搜索、编辑、验证和恢复；支持有界运行时密集验证器反馈，返回经过清理的功能观测结果，同时隐藏验证器的参考实现。

Result: 在击败种子 CVDP 智能体的困难任务（包括击败前沿编码智能体的任务）上，Trace2Skill 结合密集验证器反馈显著提升了任务通过率，并在先前未解决的任务上取得了突破性通过。

Conclusion: Trace2Skill 提供了一种通用的测试时扩展策略，无需高质量微调数据、专用 RTL 模型训练或模型权重更新，即可显著提升硬件智能体在复杂设计问题上的表现，并可推广到数字设计之外的其他可验证 EDA 任务。

Abstract: Complex Verilog Design Problems (CVDP) challenge hardware LLM agents because solving them requires localizing verifier-relevant RTL, testbenches, include paths, and build dependencies inside large repository snapshots, making precise edits, and recovering from sparse hidden-verifier failures. We present Trace2Skill, a test-time scaling framework that improves a hardware agent without RTL-specialized model fine-tuning. Rather than training a new model or only sampling more candidate solutions, Trace2Skill treats the agent's natural-language skill as an evolvable policy. It mines repeated rollout traces for success and failure modes, converts them into dense diagnostics and oracle lessons, and uses an oracle, mutator, and selector loop to produce task-specific skills that guide later search, editing, validation, and recovery. Because final pass/fail labels are often too coarse for hard failures, Trace2Skill also supports bounded runtime dense verifier feedback that returns sanitized functional observations while keeping hidden harnesses and reference solutions inaccessible to the agent. This feedback helps guide skill evolution and agent execution by connecting skill text, verifier evidence, and downstream behavior. Across hard CVDP tasks that defeat the seed CVDP agent, including tasks that also defeat frontier coding agents, Trace2Skill with dense verifier feedback substantially improves task pass rates and produces breakthrough passes on previously unsolved tasks, without requiring high-quality fine-tuning data, specialized RTL model training, or model weight updates. The same framework provides a general test-time scaling strategy that can extend beyond digital design to other verifiable EDA tasks.

</details>


### [396] [Investigating Concept Alignment Using Implausible Category Members](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21683)
*Sunayana Rane,Brenden M. Lake,Thomas L. Griffiths*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该研究通过询问AI系统关于不合理类别成员（如“橄榄是交通工具吗？”）来探索概念边界，发现AI与人类在概念理解上存在显著差异，包括将“词语”归类为“交通工具”或“服装”，将某些“蔬菜”视为“水果”，以及将非武器类示例归为“武器”，并展示这些偏差会引发AI安全问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的概念理解探测方法（询问合理类别成员）容易触发模型训练数据中的模式记忆，无法真正反映概念边界知识。作者希望通过询问不合理类别成员来更准确地刻画AI系统对概念边界的理解，并评估其与人类认知的差距。

Method: 基于Rosch和Mervis的经典心理学研究，让AI系统对一组基本概念进行上级类别归类和错配类别归类任务，并将结果与人类参与者的表现进行对比分析。

Result: AI系统在多个概念上表现出与人类有意义的差异：将“词语”错误归类为“交通工具”和“服装”，将某些“蔬菜”成员识别为“水果”，以及将非武器类示例归为“武器”。这些偏差在下游任务中转化为有问题的行为。

Conclusion: AI系统对日常概念的边界理解与人类存在显著差异，这种概念错位不仅揭示了模型认知的局限性，还可能导致下游行为中的安全问题，对AI系统的可靠性和安全性构成威胁。

Abstract: Developing AI systems with a human-like understanding of everyday concepts is a key step towards developing safe, reliable systems whose behavior makes sense to humans. When probing concept understanding, asking questions about plausible category members (e.g., "Is a car a vehicle?") is likely to recall patterns in the model's vast training data. We pursue an alternative strategy, characterizing the boundaries of conceptual categories by asking about implausible category members (e.g., "Is an olive a vehicle?") to probe the kind of concept-level knowledge we take for granted in fellow humans. We characterize concept boundaries for a set of fundamental concepts by studying AI systems' assignments of objects to superordinate categories from a classic psychological study by Rosch and Mervis, as well as their assignments of the same objects to mismatched superordinate categories. We compare these assignments to those made by human participants on the full range of within-category and cross-category assignment tasks. Our results reveal a range of concepts for which which models differ in meaningful and surprising ways from humans, including treating "words" as belonging to categories like "vehicles" and "clothing," identifying several "vegetable" category members as "fruit," and assigning exemplars from non-weapon categories to the "weapons" category. We also demonstrate how these instances of concept misalignment translate into problematic downstream behavior with implications for AI safety.

</details>


### [397] [AI-Enabled Serious Games: Integrating Intelligence and Adaptivity in Training Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21962)
*Priyamvada Tripathi,Bill Kapralos*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了如何利用现代AI技术（如大语言模型、强化学习、智能体架构）在严肃游戏中实现实时教学自适应，区分了"教学智能"与"自适应性"两个核心概念，并指出了AI集成面临的透明度、验证、计算成本和长期学习效果证据不足等挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 严肃游戏在静态场景设计、作者瓶颈、学习者建模有限以及缺乏实时教学适应等方面存在持续挑战，需要引入AI技术来克服这些局限性。

Method: 采用历史综述方法，从早期计算机辅助教学到智能辅导系统、动态难度调整、作者平台、学习分析，再到最新的AI架构，系统梳理自适应学习系统的发展脉络，并分析LLM、RL和智能体架构在严肃游戏中的应用潜力。

Result: 区分了教学智能（系统推断学习者知识并推理适当教学响应）和自适应性（在交互过程中修改教学行动）两个概念；指出AI可支持动态场景变化、上下文反馈、自适应节奏和学习者状态建模；同时揭示了可解释性、验证、计算成本和长期学习效果证据不足等挑战。

Conclusion: 当代AI方法有望推动严肃游戏中更集成的智能与自适应性，但仍需解决透明度、系统控制、信任以及实证证据不足等关键问题。

Abstract: Serious games are widely used for learning and training across domains such as healthcare, defense, and education. Persistent challenges remain, however, including static scenario design, authoring bottlenecks, limited learner modeling, and difficulty implementing meaningful real-time instructional adaptation. Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) introduce novel capabilities such as dynamic scenario variation, contextual feedback, adaptive pacing, and learner-state modeling that may help address some of these limitations. At the same time, integrating AI into serious games raises important questions related to validity, transparency, system control, and learner trust. This chapter examines how contemporary AI approaches may support real-time instructional adaptation in serious games. It distinguishes between instructional intelligence, defined as a system's capacity to infer learner knowledge and reason about pedagogically appropriate responses, and adaptivity, defined as the ability to modify instructional actions during interaction. A historical synthesis of adaptive learning systems is presented, tracing developments from early computer-assisted instruction through intelligent tutoring systems (ITS), dynamic difficulty adjustment (DDA), authoring platforms, learning analytics, and recent AI-enabled architectures. Building on this perspective, the chapter discusses how large language models (LLMs), reinforcement learning (RL), and agent-based architectures may contribute to more integrated forms of intelligence and adaptivity in serious games. It also highlights practical and research challenges associated with AI-enabled systems, including explainability, validation, computational cost, and the limited empirical evidence regarding long-term learning outcomes in AI-enabled serious games.

</details>


### [398] [The Impact of AI Usage and Informativeness on Skill Development in Logical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21695)
*Shang Wu,Hongyu Yao,Catarina Belem,Shuyuan Fu,Mark Steyvers,Padhraic Smyth*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究探讨AI使用频率和信息量对逻辑推理任务中个人技能发展的影响，发现高频率使用AI会削弱技能发展，而高信息量的AI则能提升短期表现但不影响长期表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI越来越多地融入人类问题解决过程，但其对个人技能发展的影响尚不明确，因此作者希望厘清AI使用与信息量如何塑造学习效果。

Method: 在受控的逻辑推理任务中提供按需AI辅助，通过对比不同使用频率和信息量条件下的参与者表现，分析AI对技能发展的影响。

Result: 高频AI使用者表现弱于同类非使用者；低频AI使用者表现与非使用者相似；低信息量AI既不能提升即时表现，也不能维持移除AI后的表现；高信息量AI能提升短期表现，且不降低移除AI后的平均表现，但存在异质性效应。

Conclusion: AI在不同情境下可能互补或替代人类推理能力，规范AI的访问和使用对促进技能发展至关重要。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is being increasingly integrated into human problem-solving, yet its effects on individual skill development remain unclear. We examine how both AI usage and informativeness can shape learning in the context of a controlled logical reasoning task with on-demand access to AI assistance. We find that greater AI usage is associated with weaker skill development: heavy AI users underperform relative to comparable peers, whereas light AI users perform similarly to matched users who do not use AI. We also find in our study that these patterns are mediated by AI informativeness. Low-information AI neither improves immediate performance nor preserves performance after AI assistance is removed, and is linked to weaker learning overall. On the other hand, high-information AI was found to improve short-run performance without reducing post-AI outcomes on average in our experiments, but with heterogeneous effects. Our findings in general suggest that AI can, depending on context, either complement human skill development by amplifying independent reasoning or can act as a substitute that undermines such reasoning, with the implication that regulating AI access and usage will be important for promoting skill development in the presence of AI assistance.

</details>


### [399] [The Log is the Agent: Event-Sourced Reactive Graphs for Auditable, Forkable Agentic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21997)
*Yohei Nakajima*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ActiveGraph 提出了一种反转传统 Agent 框架的运行时：以仅追加的事件日志为唯一真相源，工作图是日志的确定性投影，各种行为（函数、LLM 调用等）通过响应图变化来工作。该设计实现了确定性重放、低成本分支和端到端溯源，这些是传统记忆系统无法提供的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 Agent 框架以语言模型为中心，将对话循环、工具、规则和可观测性层层叠加，状态通过可检索的"记忆"持久化，缺乏确定性重放、分支和完整溯源能力。

Method: 将事件日志设为唯一真相源，工作图是日志的确定性投影。行为（函数、类、LLM 例程、类型化边逻辑）响应图变化并发出新事件，各组件通过共享图协调，而非直接指令。

Result: 实现了三个传统记忆系统不具备的性质：从日志确定性重放任意运行、低成本分支（无需重放共享前缀）、从高层目标到每个模型调用的端到端溯源。

Conclusion: 该架构特别适合自改进 Agent，扩展了 BabyAGI 系列和先前图记忆研究，但作者未声称已充分验证这一主张。

Abstract: Most agent frameworks are built around the language model: a conversation loop comes first, then tools, then rules, and finally a logging layer bolted on for observability, with state persisted as retrievable "memory." We describe ActiveGraph, a runtime that inverts this arrangement. The append-only event log is the source of truth; the working graph is a deterministic projection of that log; and behaviors--ordinary functions, classes, LLM-backed routines, or logic attached to typed edges--react to changes in the graph and emit new events.
